transcription.text: I got a dog, and my dog's name is Cat. Bet you never heard a thing half as crazy as that. Now it's my dog, Cat, and my cat, Dog. I confuse who's who, the cat or the dog. Now I bet you think that's pretty absurd. But wait till you hear about my fish bird. Asher! Asher, guess who ordered PetSmart on DoorDash? Yeah, I got a dog, and my dog's name is Cat. Get more from your neighborhood.
